zh-g02.gloss: Good morning! The weather is great today.

zh-n02.hanzi: 我家有四口人，不是五口。
zh-n02.gloss: There are four people in my family, not five.

zh-r06.hanzi: 请说慢一点，我是初学者。
zh-r06.gloss: Please speak slower, I'm a beginner.

zh-r09.hanzi: 你是哪国人？我是马来西亚人。
zh-r09.gloss: Which country are you from? I'm Malaysian.

zh-ti07.gloss: What day is it today? Friday.

zh-p09.hanzi: 你有孩子吗？有，一个女儿。
zh-p09.gloss: Do you have children? Yes, a daughter.

zh-h05.gloss: Excuse me, what's the Wi-Fi password?

zh-h06.gloss: Which floor is the restaurant on? The third.

zh-h08.gloss: There's no hot water in the room.

hsk2-116.gloss: The bathroom is on the right.

hsk3-225.gloss: I practice speaking Chinese every day.

hsk3-277.gloss: What grade is your child in?

hsk4-073.gloss: He was sick, therefore he didn't come to work.

hsk4-163.hanzi: 他很累，于是早点回家了。
hsk4-163.gloss: He was tired, so he went home early.

hsk4-198.gloss: That's outside the scope of my job.

hsk4-215.gloss: This movement is a bit difficult.

hsk4-234.gloss: I want to try the local food.

hsk4-273.gloss: I want to go; however, I have no time.

hsk4-333.gloss: I came especially to see you.

hsk4-352.gloss: There's a limit on parking time.

hsk4-424.gloss: The teacher takes this problem seriously.

hsk4-457.gloss: Don't be troubled, take it slow.

hsk4-464.hanzi: 他不但会说中文，还会说英文。
hsk4-464.gloss: He not only speaks Chinese but also English.

hsk4-487.hanzi: 我们来总结一下今天学的。
hsk4-487.gloss: Let's summarize what we learned today.

hsk4-506.gloss: His grandson is five this year.

hsk4-513.gloss: The night market is very lively in the evening.

hsk4-536.gloss: She's a graduate student studying Chinese.

hsk4-543.gloss: The company is hiring new people.

hsk4-545.gloss: The weather here is very dry.

hsk4-549.gloss: My grandpa lives in the countryside.

hsk4-552.gloss: Learning a language means accumulating vocabulary.

hsk4-556.gloss: He has a master's and starts a PhD next year.

hsk4-558.gloss: I want to go see the Great Wall.

hsk4-561.gloss: I need to take a day off tomorrow.

hsk4-568.hanzi: 我要一个西红柿炒鸡蛋。

hsk4-572.gloss: The trash can is by the door.

hsk4-573.gloss: No plastic bag for me, thanks.

hsk4-581.gloss: The air in the south is very humid.

hsk4-586.gloss: The shop assistant is very friendly.

hsk4-587.gloss: The Yangtze is China's longest river.

hsk4-588.gloss: He's a bit careless in what he does.

hsk4-593.gloss: Let's go see Beijing opera this weekend.

hsk4-595.gloss: Please fill in the blanks with the answers.

hsk4-596.gloss: The kids start summer vacation next week.
